mapper.select: SELECT rb.room_id AS roomId, c.center_id AS centerId, c.center_name AS centerName, c.center_region AS centerRegion, st.category AS category, st.base_fee AS baseFee, COUNT(cr.account_id) AS reviewCount, ROUND(AVG(cr.grade), 1) AS avgGrade, rb.created_at AS createdAt FROM room_booking rb JOIN rooms r ON rb.room_id = r.room_id JOIN centers c ON r.center_id = c.center_id JOIN sports_type st ON r.sport_id = st.sport_id LEFT JOIN centers_reviews cr ON c.center_id = cr.center_id WHERE rb.account_id = #{accountId} GROUP BY rb.room_id, c.center_id, c.center_name, c.center_region, st.category, st.base_fee, rb.created_at ORDER BY rb.created_at DESC
